title: Money, Money, Money
why_this_song: Money, Money, Money by ABBA (1976) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 21 times; first heard in: "Money, money, money"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "In the rich man's world"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "In the rich man's world"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "In the rich man's world"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "It's a rich man's world"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "money" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "money" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rich" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rich" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I work all night I work all day
Ah, all the things I could do

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: To pay the bills I have to pay
And if he happens to be free

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Money, Money, Money" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Money, Money, Money"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask ABBA one question about "Money, Money, Money", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para ABBA sobre "Money, Money, Money", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Money, Money, Money" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Money, Money, Money" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
